text: I can't log in to my account, it just says invalid credentials.

I recently noticed a strange issue with my account where I was charged for a subscription that I do not even recall signing up for initially, and it's not just a simple oversight because it has happened twice now in the last month. I really need your help to sort this out because I've checked every possible detail in my billing history, but nothing seems to add up, and it's quite frustrating. Can you please process a refund for these charges? Thank you.
I'm really frustrated because I can't access my account. I've tried resetting my password, but it just doesn't work. Please help!
I tried to update my email, but now I can't log in. Am I using the old email or the new one?

I recently purchased an item that I absolutely loved, but I am hoping to return it for a refund even though I was initially pleased with the purchase because it turns out it doesn't suit my needs at all. The store policy states that returns are only accepted for items that are defective, yet I'm still keen on obtaining a refund despite not meeting that criterion. What steps do I need to take to navigate this tricky situation, considering the policies might not allow it?
I’m really upset that I received a completely different color than what I ordered, and the box was all smashed too. What's going on? I even took a pic of the mess!

So, I recently had to change my email address cause I wasn't getting important messages, and now I can't figure out how to link the new one to my account. Like, it’s super frustrating because I thought it’d be a simple process, but now I’m just stuck without access! Can you help?
I think my account is locked, but I just logged in. Can you check? I don't understand what's happening.
